TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kayu-baliq, title = Kayu-baliq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kayu-baliq} }

S.FORM: alang Kayu-baliq ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 8 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 351 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Luhung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Kzyay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kayu-baliq ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 8 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 351 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Luhung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Kzyay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kaju-ő≤aliq …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan *.*%, amis~…ē *.*%, pujuma *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a luńßuŇč. taj Ēzil na kaju-ő≤aliq ńßja Ē …£a kzjaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
